findings.description: Digital signature metadata block inserted into the memo reading flow between the From and Subject fields, content not visually present in the PDF rendering.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 flows directly from 'From: Larry Frost, Engineer...' to 'Subject: Meeting Officer's Report...'. HTML inserts 'Digitally signed by LYF / DN: cn=LYF, o=DWM, ou=SWS, email=larry.frost@ncdenr.gov, c=US / Date: 2016.05.12 12:11:52 -04'00'' between the From and Subject blocks, disrupting the memo structure.

findings.description: Report outline numbering changed from Roman numerals to Arabic numerals, creating inconsistency with section headings which still use Roman numerals.
findings.evidence: PDF outline lists 'I. History/Background', 'II. March 22, 2016 Public Meeting...', 'III. Written Public Comments Summary', 'IV. Attachments'. HTML renders these as '1.', '2.', '3.', '4.' while the actual section headings in the body retain Roman numerals (I., II., III., IV.).

findings.description: Handwritten signature image present in the PDF is missing from the HTML. The PDF shows a handwritten signature between the 'From:' line and the digital signature metadata, but the HTML has no corresponding tag for it.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 displays a handwritten signature image next to 'From: Larry Frost, Engineer'. The HTML reproduces the digital signature metadata text ('Digitally signed by LYF…') but omits the signature graphic entirely.
